title.en: Medical face masks - Requirements and test methods
title.zh: 医用口罩 - 要求和试验方法

standards.abstract: Specifies construction, design and performance requirements and test methods for medical face masks.
standards.scope: Medical face masks -- Requirements and test methods.

title.en: Medical gloves for single use - Part 1: Requirements and testing for freedom from holes
title.zh: 一次性使用医用手套 - 第1部分：无孔检测的要求和试验

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and methods of test for medical gloves for single use to ensure freedom from holes. Edition 3.
standards.scope: Hole-free integrity requirements for single-use medical gloves.
standards.name: Medical gloves for single use - Part 1: Requirements and testing for freedom from holes

title.en: Medical gloves for single use - Part 2: Requirements and testing for physical properties
title.zh: 一次性使用医用手套 - 第2部分：物理性能要求和试验

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and test methods for physical properties (dimensions, tensile strength) of single-use medical gloves.
standards.scope: Physical properties testing of single-use medical gloves.

title.en: Medical gloves for single use - Part 3: Requirements and testing for biological evaluation
title.zh: 一次性使用医用手套 - 第3部分：生物学评价的要求和试验

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and methods of test for the biological evaluation of single-use medical gloves, including extractable protein and powder residue.
standards.scope: Biological evaluation of single-use medical gloves (protein, powder).

title.en: Medical gloves for single use - Part 4: Requirements and testing for shelf life determination
title.zh: 一次性使用医用手套 - 第4部分：保质期测定的要求和试验

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and methods of test for the determination of shelf life of single-use medical gloves.
standards.scope: Shelf life determination for single-use medical gloves.

title.en: Clothing for protection against infectious agents - Medical face masks - Test method for resistance against penetration by synthetic blood (fixed volume, horizontally projected)
title.zh: 防感染性病原体的防护服 - 医用口罩 - 防合成血液穿透的试验方法（固定体积，水平投射）

standards.abstract: Describes a test method for resistance of medical face masks against penetration by synthetic blood. Confirmed 2020.
standards.scope: Synthetic blood penetration resistance testing for medical face masks.
